mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, user_id, sensitive_type, resource_type, resource_id, access_reason, access_result, ip_address, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sensitive_data_access_log ( tenant_id, user_id, sensitive_type, resource_type, resource_id, access_reason, access_result, ip_address ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{sensitiveType}, #{resourceType}, #{resourceId}, #{accessReason}, #{accessResult}, #{ipAddress} )
